title: Fly like Superman
result_description: You run, jump, and launch straight up out of frame into the sky like a flying superhero.

inputs.name: main_clip
inputs.what_to_film: Run into an open area and jump up; lock exposure on the ground and frame the sky/clouds.

capture_requirements.note: capture on the upward jump, not the descent

inputs.name: clean_plate
inputs.what_to_film: Same locked shot with nobody in frame, taken close in time so the clouds match.

edit_steps.note: trim to the take you like and cut to the moment the body is rising on the jump
create a freeze frame at the top of the jump — this becomes the flying body
cut the frozen body out of the background (Custom Removal is cleaner if Pro)
set a position keyframe at the jump, then drag the cutout straight up and out of frame
freeze a clean-plate frame nearest the action so the clouds line up
stack: original on bottom, clean plate in the middle, animated cutout on top
set the layer order (0/1/2) so the cutout stays on top after rearranging
thin masks over body and ground shadow with feather to patch the take-off spot
keyframe the patch layers fading 0->100 in sync, not before the launch keyframe starts
add a subtle whoosh/shockwave SFX (~ -5 dB background plus a prominent whoosh)
export, re-import the render, split the launch section and turn Motion Blur up (can't apply to freeze frames)

result.description: The frozen, cut-out body animates up and off the top of frame over a clean sky.
success_criteria: Body launches smoothly straight up out of frame
Patched take-off area shows no body/shadow ghost
Motion blur smooths the launch edges
